tests.name: Headwall inside room is accepted
tests.proves: R1 boundary admits legal footprints

tests.name: Headwall crossing the wall is rejected
tests.proves: R1 boundary blocks out-of-bounds footprints

tests.name: Physical footprint overlap is rejected (ERROR)
tests.proves: R2 collision is a hard stop

tests.name: Clearance encroachment commits with a WARNING
tests.proves: R2 two-tier verdict: snaps-but-flags (the T1 tier)

tests.name: Bed with no med-gas source is rejected
tests.proves: R3 dependency: a requirer needs a provider

tests.name: Bed beyond med-gas reach is rejected
tests.proves: R3 dependency respects the reach limit

tests.name: Bed within reach earns a med_gas binding
tests.proves: R3 a satisfied dependency creates a directed edge

tests.name: Rotated bed commits but is flagged
tests.proves: R4 advisory rules warn without blocking

tests.name: A rejected command writes nothing
tests.proves: The gate is real: no event, no edge on rejection

tests.name: Edges follow state (remove source → edge gone)
tests.proves: Connections are earned, never promiscuous

tests.name: Clients hold no domain rules (thin-client)
tests.proves: Validation lives only server-side; renderer owns nothing

tests.name: Replay is deterministic
tests.proves: Folding a journal is a pure, repeatable function

tests.name: State rebuilds from the journal after restart
tests.proves: Truth survives because the log does (audit-grade)

tests.name: Agent proposes but never commits
tests.proves: HITL: AI suggests, only a human approval writes

tests.name: Approving the agent's proposal is accepted & cited
tests.proves: Agent output is grounded and commit-ready

tests.name: Concurrent edit is judged against current truth
tests.proves: Stale-for-eyes, current-for-the-gate: no stale-approval

tests.name: Stale-but-legal edit rebases, never corrupts
tests.proves: Optimism is UX on top of one truth, not a second truth

tests.name: Idempotent command retry never double-writes
tests.proves: A retried command after a blip places once, not twice

tests.name: Placed instance pins its exact type version
tests.proves: A later type bump can't silently mutate an approved design

tests.name: Validation (gate) latency
tests.proves: Gate is sub-millisecond → 'snaps instantly' is real (T0/T1)

tests.name: Full commit latency (validate+append+fold)
tests.proves: End-to-end command path stays interactive
